tag.v: The gazetted name of the station is Wattleglen, however Wattle Glen is used in all publications and signage.
Location is approximate - imagery has not been updated
Pakenham/Cranbourne services are limited at Hawksburn station.
Metro Trains Melbourne;V/Line;NSW Trains;Great Southern Rail
Sunbury services do not stop here.
Location is approximate - new station location is not yet reflected in imagery
Metro Trains Melbourne;Public Transport Victoria - Metro
